title: Intermediate Version
description: Intermediate Version is a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack designed for players who want to experience the latest Minecraft versions (e.g., 1.21.10) without sacrificing the charm of new content.
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Intermediate_Versions/MP_IntermediateVersions_header1.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/intermediate-version) version.** ## Intermediate Version is a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack designed for players who want to experience the latest Minecraft versions (e.g., 1.21.10) without sacrificing the charm of new content. Unlike most modpacks that target stable versions like 1.20.1 or 1.21.1 due to broader mod availability, this pack is crafted to keep up with Minecraft's latest updates, ensuring you can enjoy the freshest vanilla features alongside carefully curated mods. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Intermediate_Versions/MP_IntermediateVersions_description.webp) This modpack is for players who love staying on the cutting edge of Minecraft’s updates but still crave the extra flair of mods. By focusing on intermediate versions like 1.21.5, Intermediate Version bridges the gap between vanilla’s latest features and the enriched gameplay of modded Minecraft, all while maintaining a compact and cohesive mod list. - ~150 Mods: A balanced selection that enhances gameplay without overwhelming the vanilla feel. - New Biomes: Explore diverse, beautifully crafted landscapes that blend seamlessly with Minecraft’s world generation. - Unique Animals: Encounter new creatures that add life and variety to your adventures. - Custom Structures: Discover fresh points of interest, from hidden ruins to grand landmarks. - Additional Dimensions: Venture into new realms with unique mechanics and aesthetics, kept minimal to preserve the Vanilla+ experience. - Performance Optimized: Lightweight and compatible with intermediate versions for a smooth experience. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Intermediate_Versions/MP_IntermediateVersions_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Intermediate_Versions/MP_IntermediateVersions_screenshots.webp) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
